Name: Horizontal scroll
Description: Horizontal scroll enables users to scroll horizontally within a container to view hidden content that extends beyond the visible area.
Dynamic Behaviour:
When the minimum size column is smaller than 80px, display the horizontal scroll bar to enable left and right scrolling. 

https://www.loom.com/share/613d022a85204aecb963b918bc315208?sid=ee08b405-24b3-4c0d-a183-9ea298d4b816

Name: Fixed column
Description: The column will always be sticked on the edge
Dynamic Behaviour: If there is horizontal scroll, the primary column and action column will always be visible on the table.

Name: Fixed header area
Description: The header area is stick on the top, so that users can have all the function and clear label all the time
Dynamic Behaviour: When users scroll down the page, the header area are always on the top of the table

Name: Vertical scroll
Description: Vertical scroll behavior allows users to scroll up or down within a container, enabling them to access additional content that extends beyond the visible area vertically.
Dynamic Behaviour:
When the object rows are longer than the screen size, display the vertical scroll bar to enable up and down scrolling. 

The search bar, filter chips and global button area, and the table header area are always stick on the top while page scrolling

https://www.loom.com/share/36b4cb3e83064208a3622ff52f2b2ca2?sid=68969678-5878-443c-910b-3ee7a29fe2fd
Default State: Display placeholder text. When users type in anything, replace it with user’s text
